# Groar

> Turn your metrics into shareable visuals in 10 seconds

Groar is a web app that transforms social media analytics and business metrics into beautiful, shareable images. Built for creators, founders, and makers who build in public.

## What It Does

Create scroll-stopping visuals from your growth data — followers, MRR, GitHub stars, revenue, and 30+ other metrics. Pick a template, customize the look, export, and share.

## Supported Metrics

- **X (Twitter)**: followers, impressions, replies, likes, reposts, bookmarks, engagement rate, and more
- **SaaS/Business**: MRR, ARR, revenue, customers, subscriptions, churn rate, LTV, sales, visitors
- **GitHub**: stars, commits, forks, contributors, PRs closed, issues resolved
- **Reddit**: karma, upvotes

## Templates

- **Metrics**: display key performance indicators
- **Milestone**: celebrate achievements (e.g. "10K followers!")
- **Progress**: show progress toward a goal
- **List**: announce features or updates

## Key Features

- 25+ curated backgrounds + solid color option
- Multiple aspect ratios: post (16:9), square (1:1), banner (3:1)
- 6 font families, custom text colors
- Custom branding with logo upload
- Auto-fill metrics from connected X account and TrustMRR
- Analytics dashboard with daily tracking
- Undo/redo, keyboard shortcuts (Cmd+S to export)
- Export as high-quality PNG, auto-copy to clipboard
- Direct share to X with pre-filled tweet
- Community leaderboard with badges and streaks

## Pricing

- **Free**: full editor, 3 exports/week, 5 backgrounds, watermark
- **Pro Monthly**: $5/mo — unlimited exports, all backgrounds, no watermark, branding, analytics
- **Pro Lifetime**: from $9 one-time (early adopter pricing, increases as spots fill)
- **3-day free trial** of Pro, no credit card required

## Tech

- Next.js App Router, TypeScript
- Auth: Google + X (Twitter) OAuth via Better Auth
- Payments: Creem (primary), Polar (legacy)
- Analytics: PostHog

## Links

- Website: https://groar.app
- Creator: Yannick Ferire — https://x.com/yannick_ferire
